title: Clicker Mod
description: plays a clicker sound when someone says ~click~ (changeable). with the ability for the user to add their own sound effect if the they want to. do /clckrm
body:
plays a clicker sound when someone says ~click~ this can be changed by doing /clckrm trg <trigger,trigger2,...>.

The user can add and use their own sound effect via dragging a .wav file into AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\config\chatsoundmod\sounds then running /clckrm select <sound>, The user can also do /clckrm preview to preview the sound effect. /clckrm list to view avaliable sounds.

The user can do /clckrm bl on, then clckrm bl add/remove <user> to make it so a user cant or can trigger the sound effect and clckrm bl list.

The user can do /clckrm wl on, then clckrm wl add/remove <user> to make it so only people that are whitelisted (clckrm wl list/l to view the whitelisted people) can trigger the sound effect.

/clckrm self <on/off> ignore or include your own messages - self explanatory.
/clckrm Vol <0.0-2.0> - set sound volume - self explanatory.

NOTE: ogg and mp3 sound files most likely wont work! convert them to .wav for best compatibility
